name: Grafana MCP Server
description: Connects AI agents to Grafana via an official MCP server — query dashboards, datasources, Prometheus and Loki, and manage alerts and incidents. By Grafana Labs, Apache-2.0. 3k+ GitHub stars.

skills.name: Dashboard Search
skills.description: Finds and reads Grafana dashboards and panels so agents can reference existing visualizations and queries.

skills.name: Datasource Query
skills.description: Runs queries against Prometheus, Loki, and other datasources to pull metrics and logs into an agent.

skills.name: Incident Management
skills.description: Lists and updates alerts and incidents so agents can triage and act on observability events.
